description_long: This object consists of a small cluster of four mushrooms, each with a broad, flat, reddish-brown cap and a short, thick stem. The caps are polygonal and slightly irregular, with a matte finish and a subtle, smooth texture. The edges of the caps are slightly wavy and lighter in color, suggesting a natural margin. The stems are cylindrical, tapering slightly toward the base, and are colored a muted brown with lighter tips. No gills are visible beneath the caps, and the mushrooms appear solid and robust. The overall appearance is stylized, with simplified forms and a cohesive color palette.
description: A cluster of four stylized, reddish-brown mushrooms with broad, flat caps and thick stems, featuring wavy edges and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Three large mushroom caps and one smaller cap are visible, with the stems mostly exposed and the caps overlapping slightly.
description_view_1: The two largest caps are stacked, with the stems partially hidden and the cap edges more prominent.
description_view_2: The cluster is seen from the side, showing the overlapping caps and the stems extending downward.
description_view_3: The view highlights the front of the cluster, with all four caps visible and the stems clearly separated.
